qualification_model.points_per_win: 4 pts (standard win) or 5 pts (win by big margin — bonus point)
qualification_model.note: Points system: a standard win = 4 pts; winning by a big margin earns a bonus point = 5 pts. WW already sit 5th (29 pts) with a 5-point cushion over 8th place. Six must-win fixtures remain against bottom-half teams. Winning all 6 with bonus points = +30 pts (total 59). Even winning 4 of 6 at 4 pts each = +16 pts (total 45) — comfortably safe. Priority: don't just win the easy games, WIN BIG to bank bonus points and improve NRR. The three Upset games (Pway Cubs, Giant Slayers, NJ Marvels) are bonus opportunities — any win there is a gift.

briefing: Waterfront Warriors are 5th in Group C with 29 points from 9 games (6W/3L). The points system awards 4 pts for a win and 5 pts for a win by big margin (bonus point). With 11 games remaining — 6 must-wins, 3 swing games, 2 upsets — WW's playoff place is in their own hands. Win the must-win games by healthy margins to stack bonus points. Qualification is very likely; the real target is finishing as high as possible for a favourable playoff draw.
